zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark於1240年出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德時，她的父親King Abel von Dänemark22歲，母親Mechtilde af Holsten21歲。她和Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1284年在德國安哈爾特享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark于1240年出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德时，她的父亲King Abel von Dänemark22岁，母亲Mechtilde af Holsten21岁。她和Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1284年在德国安哈爾特享年45岁。

meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark was born in 1240, in Roskilde, Denmark, her father, King Abel von Dänemark, was 22 and her mother, Mechtilde af Holsten, was 21. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg. She died about 1284, in Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark est née en 1240, à Roskilde, Danemark, son père, King Abel von Dänemark, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mechtilde af Holsten, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg. Elle est décédée environ 1284, à Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kr: Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark 1240 in Roskilde, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Abel von Dänemark 22 und ihre Mutter Mechtilde af Holsten 21. Sie hatte mit Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1284 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Anhalt, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark è nata il nel 1240 nel Roskilde, Danimarca, sua padre, King Abel von Dänemark, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mechtilde af Holsten, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg. Morì circa 1284, nel Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmarkが1240年にデンマークロスキルドで生まれた時，父King Abel von Dänemarkは22歳，母Mechtilde af Holstenは21歳であった。彼女はPrince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburgとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1284年にドイツアンハルトで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark(이)가 1240년 덴마크 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Abel von Dänemark(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechtilde af Holsten(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1284년 독일 아할트에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark nasceu em 1240, em Roskilde, Dinamarca, seu pai, King Abel von Dänemark, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mechtilde af Holsten, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1284, em Anhalt, Alemanha, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark родилась в 1240 г. в местности роскаилд, Дания, её отцу по имени King Abel von Dänemark было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mechtilde af Holsten, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg. Она умерла около 1284 г. в местности анэлт, Германия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark nació en 1240, en Roskilde, Dinamarca, su papá, King Abel von Dänemark, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mechtilde af Holsten, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg. Murió aproximadamente 1284, en Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 45 años.
